epistemicStatus: Exploratory S1-preparation pilot. MEASURES YIELD (records that CAN carry a source-asserted/candidate UFO value), NOT PRECISION (correctness of those values — needs the §4.3 human audit, not performed here). Local bytes only; no encoder version; no registry write; NO feasibility conclusion (design §14).

reachability_100k.question: S0 §2.3: SemCor tag_cnt exhausted at 27,210 < 100k. Does WN∪OBO∪SUMO clear 100k type-level clusters WITHOUT named entities?

four_counts_S35.exactly_crosswalked_clusters: NOT COMPUTED — source↔source exact crosswalk (WN↔OBO↔SUMO) is S1 step-3 engineering not yet built; only kernel-v0 anchor alignments ship. See caveat.
four_counts_S35.fully_resolved_ckufo_records: NOT COMPUTED — requires endorsement + human audit (S1→S2 gate).

reachability_100k.caveat: UNMERGED union upper bound: cross-source duplicates (e.g. WordNet cell ↔ CL cell) are NOT yet merged, so the true type-level count is LOWER. The measured point is that the union HEADROOM is >100k whereas the tag_cnt rule floored at 27,210 — the selection-rule exhaustion blocker (§2.3) is retired by the portfolio; the exact post-merge count is S1 step-3 work.

domain_balance.requirement: design §0: a second domain-balanced count must exclude domination by a single taxonomy/domain.
domain_balance.note: NCBITaxon is only 402 records locally (not the full millions-of-taxa dump), so single-TAXONOMY domination is NOT the local risk; single-DOMAIN (biology, via all-OBO) is. A domain-balanced 100k needs a non-biological structured source (Wikidata class subset, §3.1) that is NOT yet local — flagged as the one missing ingredient for a domain-balanced (not merely 100k) rung.

domain_balance_v2_with_wikidata.question: design §0 domain-balance: after folding the pre-registered balanced Wikidata non-bio slice into the source-asserted-UFO-typed core (was ~100% biology = all-OBO), does biology share fall into the 45-65% target band?
domain_balance_v2_with_wikidata.typed_structured_core_definition: source-asserted-UFO-typed records only: OBO classes (all biology, 99.99% BFO-typed after the bridge) + the balanced Wikidata non-bio slice (crosswalk-typed). Excludes the WordNet lexical backbone (AxiomsOnly, no source-asserted UFO type) and SUMO upper.
domain_balance_v2_with_wikidata.note: Wikidata domains are non-biological by construction (non-bio P279* roots). Position is capped at census from its full 103,714 chunk; vehicle/organization were capped at ingest; occupation is uncapped. This is a YIELD/coverage balance metric, not a typing-PRECISION claim (the §4.3 human audit is separate).

typing_yield_vs_wordnet_zero.question: S0 §2.1: WordNet-only gave 0% source-asserted ontic_category, 0% identity, 0% dependence. Do OBO/BFO + SUMO commitments (cascade steps 1-2) yield NONZERO on those fields?

bridge_lift.bridge_source: data/onto-obo/bfo-bridge.json (LIT-BACKED per row: recovered root→BFO edges the subset-only extractor dropped; 2 STIPULATED rows for MONDO:injury and NCBITaxon orphans)

ontic_ontology_grounded_fallback_stipula.note: covers the residue still reaching no BFO anchor after the bridge

identity_provider_candidate_via_genus.note: genus-differentia logical definition supplies an identity-provider CANDIDATE via the genus chain — WordNet has none.

dependence_candidate_via_RO_relationship.note: RO relationship edges (part_of, has_part, ...) are dependence CANDIDATES — WordNet antonym/similarTo are lexical, not dependence.

argument_typing_domain_range.note: SUMO domain/range axioms give selectional/argument structure — the layer FrameNet only scaffolds and WordNet lacks.

biconditional_definitions.note: SUMO <=> biconditionals are its genuinely-definitional statements.

typing_yield_vs_wordnet_zero.interpretation: YIELD not PRECISION. A NONZERO source-asserted ontic yield + NONZERO identity-provider-candidate + NONZERO dependence-candidate demonstrates the multi-source portfolio has an EVIDENTIAL PATH to the UFO fields that WordNet-only lacked entirely. Whether those candidates are CORRECT at the §4.3 0.95 bar is a SEPARATE human-audit measurement this probe does not perform.
